archive.description: Archive mode; equivalent to -rlptgoD, preserving symlinks, permissions, times, groups, owner, devices

compress.description: Compress file data during the transfer

delete.description: Delete extraneous files from the destination directory during sync

exclude.description: Exclude files matching the given pattern from the transfer

remote_shell.description: Specify the remote shell to use (e.g. 'ssh -p 2222')

partial.description: Keep partially transferred files for resuming interrupted transfers
